message:
feat: Implement WITH RECURSIVE CTEs with nested expressions

- Add is_recursive flag to CTEDef struct
- Implement materializeRecursiveCTE function for recursive CTE execution
- Add support for base case reading from real tables with WHERE clauses
- Handle empty anchor cases (WHERE 1 = 0)
- Add nested expression support (arg_2_func, arg_2_nested_val_int, etc.)
- Fix parenthesized column expressions like (n + 1)
- Duplicate CTE names to persistent memory to prevent corruption
- Use heap allocation for base case values to avoid stack overflow

3/4 recursive CTE tests now pass:
- Sequence generation (1 to 10)
- Factorial calculation
- Empty anchor terminates
- Org hierarchy still needs JOIN support in recursive case
